utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present with both physical and mental health insurance and costs specified; property_coverage is null (missing); travel_coverage is present with plan, coverage details, and cost; additional_services is present with description and cost; total_budget is present with amounts and a note. Fully specified check: health_coverage includes both physical and mental with plan names, details, and costs—meets requirement; property_coverage is missing; travel_coverage includes plan, coverage details, and cost—meets requirement; additional_services includes service and cost—meets requirement; total_budget includes monthly cost breakdown—meets requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan (which corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan in mental health), PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, and Telemedicine Services add-on. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 9; PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance) has rating 6; Telemedicine Services has rating 8.
